Comment.value: Called from Script Start Localisation Package and Localise new text

Stage Name Text status HT Text status MT 1. Language added - (text does not exist) - (text does not exist) 2. Text prepared for translation Not translated Not translate 3. Original text sent Not translated Sent to API + async translation id:¶[id_from_api] (async only) 4. Translated text imported Not reviewed Not reviewed 5. Translation in review In progress In progress 6. Translation approved Approved Approved

Translation MASTER includes the following operations: 1. Prepare new text fields, labelled with the right language and country code 2. Export texts to disk (HT) or to the translation API (MT) 3. Import texts from the translation API (MT Only) Depending on translation API operation 2 and 3 may be performed at the same time.

Calculation.Text: Case ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage = 1; 2; FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage)

Comment.value: Translation method is either "Human translation" HT or "Machine translation" MT
Get translation api for MT in step 2

Calculation.Text: "Cannot use this api for Package localisation"
"Sorry, you cannot use the Funkis Cloud translation APIs for Package localisation."

Comment.value: If executed from card window - close window
STEP 1: Create new text fields with original id and with new language and country code

Calculation.Text: $num_of_created & " new localised text fields created in database."

Comment.value: STEP 2: Export untranslated texts to local disk for human translation or to an API for machine translation.

Calculation.Text: "Text files exported to users local export path."
$translation_api_name & " sent " & $num_of_new_translations & " texts to API and " & $num_of_updated_translations & " updated texts."
$translation_api_name & " translated " & $num_of_new_translations & " new texts and " & $num_of_updated_translations & " updated texts."

Comment.value: STEP 2.1: Get translations from asynchronous MT API
If something goes wrong when fetching texts - update localisation stage

Calculation.Text: ($num_of_updated_translations + $num_of_new_translations) & " texts are sent to the API and translation is now in progress. Press Get when you want to try to fetch the translations.¶¶ If translation is not complete yet, wait a few minutes and press button \"Get async text\" in localisation tools."
($num_of_updated_translations + $num_of_new_translations) & " texts sent to asynchronous API but not fetched."

Comment.value: Wait one minute then try again. Only 5 tries allowed.

Calculation.Text: $translation_method = "Machine translation" And Not Translation API @ Package::Asynchronous
"Localisation set to stage 2 after creating translation files."
